title: Nicholas II Murderer

title: Shotgun Patterning
description: Why do hunters pattern their shotguns?
narrative: The user seeks an explanatory answer about the practice of shotgun patterning among hunters. Sources that discuss historical or practical motivations, recommended patterns for various game, and the impact on ethical shot placement are considered relevant, while commercial listings, unrelated weapon upgrades, or hunting trip ads are not.

Sources such as dictionaries, encyclopedias, or scholarly articles that explicitly define or explain "geon" are considered relevant, while unrelated content (e.g., unrelated technical terms or unrelated definitions) is not.

title: Pareto Chart Definition
